title: Past Events
content: Past Events 1. Webinar on Preparation Strategy to Clear IAS Exam in First Attempt Center of Excellence – Industry 5.0, at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat successfully conducted a webinar on a topic needed to be discussed and brought light upon - “Preparation strategy to clear IAS exam in first Attempt”. The webinar enabled the attendees to get a very detailed and insightful vision into the exam’s pattern, preparation and perspective of the exam thus bestowing a concrete direction for the willing aspirants to prepare accordingly to succeed in the exam. Click – Brochure 2. International Expert Talk Series on Industry 5.0: The ‘Human Touch’ Revolution. Department of Computer Science and Engineering & Information Technology at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat organized a International Expert Talk Series on INDUSTRY 5.0: The ‘Human Touch’ Revolution on 29th September , 2020 Click – Brochure 3. Online Certification Workshop on Fundamentals of Information Technology. Samagra Shiksha in collaboration with Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat conducted a fifteen day Online Certification Workshop on Fundamentals of Information Technology for Block Resource Coordinators, DIET’s, Teacher Training In charges and Coordinators of Samagra Shiksha of Himachal Pradesh on 6th August, 2020. Click – Brochure 4. Online Certification Workshop on Fundamentals of Information Technology. Samagra Shiksha in collaboration with Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat conducted a fifteen day Online Certification Workshop on Fundamentals of Information Technology for The State Resource Group for Online Content Creation, Samagra Shiksha of Himachal Pradesh on 9th July, 2020. Click – Brochure 5. Faculty Development Programme on "Transforming Education with Industry 4.0 Department of Computer Science and Engineering & Information Technology at Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat organized an International one week Faculty Development Programme on "Transforming Education with Industry 4.0" from 15th June - 20th June 2020.
